name: Fresh Asparagus-Shrimp Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice following package directions; salt optional. Reserve.
2. Clean and slice asparagus into 1 1/2-inch pieces. Heat 1 tablespoon of the margarine in a large nonstick skillet. Add asparagus; stir-fry for 3 minutes. Remove from skillet. Reserve.
3. Add remaining 1 tablespoon margarine to skillet. Add shrimp; stir-fry over high heat for 2 minutes. Stir in garlic; stir-fry for another minute. Stir in lemon juice, salt and pepper.
4. Stir asparagus and rice into skillet. Heat to serving temperature. Garnish with lemon wedges, if desired.
